errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidCode: Enter the 6-digit code from the SMS.
errors.invalidName: Enter your full name to continue.
errors.invalidPhone: Enter a valid phone number with country code.

auth.otpDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your phone to continue.
auth.phoneDescription: Use your phone number to sign in or create your account.
auth.phoneFooter: We will text you a one-time verification code.
auth.profileDescription: Add your name to finish setting up your account. Avatar upload will come later.
auth.profileFooter: Your role controls the screens and permissions you get in the app.
auth.roleDescription: Choose how you use BarberQ so we can send you to the right workspace.
auth.roleFooter: You can change this later by updating your account data directly in Supabase.
auth.welcomeBody: Customers book appointments and shop owners manage their business from the same app. Sign in with your phone number to continue.
auth.welcomeDescription: Fast barber booking for customers and shop management for owners.
auth.welcomeFooter: English and Hebrew are both supported, including RTL layouts.

booking.description: Placeholder booking stack entry point for the multi-step customer booking flow.
booking.title: Booking Flow

customer.bookingsDescription: Placeholder customer bookings screen for upcoming and past appointments.
customer.exploreDescription: Placeholder explore screen for nearby barber shops, maps, and discovery.
customer.favoritesDescription: Placeholder favorites screen for saved shops.
customer.profileDescription: Placeholder profile screen for account settings and language preferences.

shopOwner.barbersDescription: Placeholder barbers screen for managing staff and availability.
shopOwner.calendarDescription: Placeholder calendar screen for all shop appointments.
shopOwner.dashboardDescription: Placeholder dashboard for today's appointments and quick stats.
shopOwner.shopDescription: Placeholder shop management screen for business details and settings.
